untranslatable_reason: Signal requires fundamental/accounting metrics not available in allowed indicators: past growth metrics (sales growth, earnings growth, operating income growth, cash flow growth), valuation multiples (price-to-earnings, price-to-operating income, price-to-cash flow), decile rankings, and forward-looking market expectations. These are cross-sectional fundamental factors requiring external data (financial statements, analyst forecasts), not price/volume-based technical indicators.
translation_notes: SSRN_227016_1 is a value/glamour reversion factor model that relies on: (1) historical fundamental growth rates across multiple metrics, (2) current valuation multiples, and (3) decile-based classification. The allowed indicator set contains only technical price/volume metrics (MA, RSI, ATR, Bollinger, MACD, etc.) and cannot capture fundamental characteristics or forward expectations. To implement this signal, a backtest engine would need access to quarterly/annual financial data, earnings estimates, and the ability to compute rolling growth rates and multiples for decile assignment.
